'''''Pizzazz'' 9''' is the ninth issue in the [[Marvel Comics]] popular culture monthly magazine. This issue was cover-dated [[June]] [[1978]] and featured the conclusion of the serialized ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic ''[[The Keeper's World]]''.<ref name="Issue 9" />

The issue also features the article "Space Heroes, Monsters and Far-Far Out Worlds," discussing science fiction films including [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'']]. An ad and order form to join the [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Official Star Wars Fan Club]] can be found in the issue as well.<ref name="Issue 9" />

This issue was advertised in a television commercial for ''Pizzazz'', which showed the first page of ''[[The Final Fury!]]'', the issue's segment of ''The Keeper's World''.<ref name="Commercial">{{YouTube|video=KNV0MLd5tvM|text=Pizzazz Magazine by Marvel featuring Spider-Man (Commercial, 1978)|channel=@FuzzyMemoriesTV|name=The Museum of Classic Chicago Television}}</ref>
